title: Sync Jira releases and sprints with Monday tasks
excerpt: Syncing Jira releases and sprints with Monday tasks would be helpful to roll high-level Jira project progress into a larger project board in Monday. I am using the new Jira cloud integration, not the deprecated version.

posts.author: steveg (Steve Glick)
posts.cookedHtml: Syncing Jira releases and sprints with Monday tasks would be helpful to roll high-level Jira project progress into a larger project board in Monday. I am using the new Jira cloud integration, not the deprecated version.
